name: Grey's Anatomy (Season 2!! The besssttt oneeeee)
description:
ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩﮩ٨ـﮩ_______💔 𝐇ⱺ𝗌ρ𝗂𝗍αᥣ 𝐇𝖾α𝗋𝗍 𝐁𝗋𝖾α𝗄 ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ_______💔 Why does everyone fall in love with someone? I mean, yeah it's because they make you feel happy, or help you work through things, but when you fall in love with someone how do you know its true love? Everyone says that there's no such thing as true love, but a person can dream right. You want your fairy tale ending. And you're going to get it!

Hiii :3 It's me, ☾mo0nbAbe☽! Basically just all the dumb heart breaks. (CRISTINA DIDN'T DESERVE THAT SHONDA). This bot was requested by @paii.47! They have good taste with season choice! Sorry if you don't like the bot Paii! I just did what came to my head when I saw the suggestion! Anyways! Leave a complaint, suggestion, or a question! Go check out my other bots! Have a great day!! BYEEEE!!! 𝙍𝙚𝙦𝙪𝙚𝙨𝙩!!!
